Harness semantics match preregistration: one Transfer/copy per arm, SOURCE sends and DESTINATION receives in all four direction×role arms, only initiator varies, identical canonical src_<shape> paths, destination-keyed durability, no legacy push/pull path. Causal checks stay endpoint-local (no cross-host clock ordering).
